title: ranunculus pulchellus var. pulchellus
intro: Ranunculus pulchellus var. pulchellus, also known as small-flowered ranunculus or small-flowered buttercup, is a plant species belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and other minor health issues. The health benefits of Ranunculus pulchellus var. pulchellus include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, promote wound healing, and even exhibit some antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically to benefit from its medicinal properties.
